content.full_text:
July 27, 1976

Mr. Jack Heinrich  
Kaiser Industries Corporation  
300 Lakeside Drive  
Oakland, California 94666

Dear Mr. Heinrich:

This letter is to confirm my advice to you today by telephone.

You stated the following facts: (1) Edgar F. Kaiser was a major donor committee in 1975 and filed campaign statements reporting his contributions through December 31, 1975. (2) Mr. Kaiser's monetary contributions in 1976 total less than $5,000. (3) Mr. Kaiser has made no expenditures in behalf of candidates or ballot measure campaigns in 1976. You asked whether Mr. Kaiser must file an off-year campaign disclosure statement under Government Code Section 84206, covering the period from January 1, 1976 through June 30, 1976.

I advised that, based on the facts stated above, Mr. Kaiser does not qualify as a committee under Government Code Section 82013 and therefore at the present time has no reporting obligations under the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.

Sincerely,

Nan Hambleton  
Special Compliance Representative

NH:bw

bcc: Jeanne P.
